raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo raugi/ tas KURGS
ißeß no jawas Weetas peemeke-
leht; to Metaisnibu to Eedsihwo-
taju tahs Semines pahr win-
xeem/ un ta Semine atfegß win-
no Affini/ un ne apklahs wairs
jawus Nokautus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nahkoscha Laika faknol
Jehkabs/ Israëls Sattohs/ un fe
dehs/ un tee pildihs to Semine
Wirfu ar Augteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Irrag wiꞥſch to ta fitt
ka wiꞥſch winna Sittejus fitt
irr? Irrag tas ta nokauts/
winna Nokautee irr nokauti ta
puſcht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXVII. Nodalla.
Irr weena krafschna Cepreezinaschana/ ka
Deews to Satanu un winna Pestelus rahs
un apkaweß: 1. To Wihna-Dahrsu ja,
was kristitas Draudses sargahß: 2. Un
kad wiꞥſch tohs Judu Basnizas buhs is,
pohstijs zaur to Gluddinaſchannu ta Evan-
geljuma/ tad wiꞥſch no Judeem un Paga-
xeem few weenu Draudsi ſakrahß: 12.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pamehreni tu winnu
fohdi/ kad tu tohs leeß aiswes
tee nopuhſchahß ar ganschu Na
puhſchanu/ tai Deena ta Riht
Wehja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ai Deena peemekelehs
tas KURGS ar jawu
zeetu/ leelu un stipru
Sohbtinu to Lerwijatanu weenu
lthdsennu Tschuhſku/ un to Lerwi-
jatann to lihku Tschuhſku/ un
wiꞥſch nokaus to leelu Tschuhſ-
ku/ kas Juhrā irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz taps zaur to Jeſ
kaba Noseegums fallidsinahts
un tchis irr wiß tas Anglis/ k
wiꞥſch winna Grehkus atneime
un darrihs wiſus Afrikus t
Altara par tskaisiteem Gru
scheem/ tee elkadeetvigi Mesd
un Elka Stabbi ne pastahwebs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tai Deena buhs weens
Wihnu-Dahrs ar farkannu Wih-
nu/ dseedajt no ta jawā Starpā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas stipre Pilsfabt
taps weentuls/ tahs Mahju
Weetas taps nostuintas un af
stahtas ka Turknefe/ tur Tekk
taps ganniti/ un tur tee gulſees
un no-ehdihs winna Schagarue
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es tas KURGS pafargu
to/ ik Azzumirkli gribbu es to
flazzinaht/ ka ne kas winnu pee-
mekle/ Nakti un Deena es win-
nu ſargatchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad winna Sarri faka
tuschi buhs/ tad taps tee nolaſ
siti/ un tahs Seewas nahks n
ededſmahs winnas. Jo tee ir
Landis kam Prahta newaid/ ta
pehz winno Darritajs pahr teen
ne apschehloſees/ un kas tohs ir
darrijs/ tas winneem Schehla
ftibu ne parahdihs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bahrsiba pee mannim ne
irr: Kaut man buhtu ja-karro ar
Ehrſchkeemi un Dadscheem/ ka
es pretti teem zeltohs/ un tohs
kohpa fadeſinatu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tai Deena iſkuls ta
KURgs no tahs Uppes Mallas
lihdstai Egiptes Uppci/ tomeb
juh
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kaut wiꞥſch mannu Speh-
fu peejemtu; Wiꞥſch darrihs
Meeru ar man/ Meeru darrihs
wiꞥſch ar mannim.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
